summary: Frontend-only testing of ReportsSection.jsx fix. Verified that reports render properly on the Reports tab with blue header, action buttons (PDF/Word/Print), and markdown content visible. The Full Detailed report for case_f8bf63e9dcbe (Homann v R) displays correctly with 80,013 characters of content, proper markdown structure (16 h2, 36 h3, 212 paragraphs), and no console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: ReportsSection.jsx correctly handles report status: completed reports show full content, generating/failed reports with existing content show status banner ABOVE preserved content
Lines 629-761 contain status banner logic for generating/failed states with existing content
Lines 771-937 wrap content in div with statusBanner above content card
Report content extraction at lines 630-636 correctly pulls from report.content.analysis or backup_analysis
Markdown rendering uses ReactMarkdown with remarkGfm plugin and custom link/table components
All action buttons (PDF, Word, Print, Full Report Page) have proper data-testid attributes
context_for_next_testing_agent: ReportsSection.jsx fix verified. The component correctly shows report content for completed reports. For generating/failed reports WITH existing content, a status banner appears ABOVE the preserved content (not hiding it). Case case_f8bf63e9dcbe (Homann v R) has a full_detailed report with status 'completed' and 80,013 chars of content that renders properly with markdown formatting.
